client.name: Porsche China
client.notes: Internal milestone film. Contact: Michael. Townhall/year-end meeting. Historic significance: first classic cars permitted on public roads in mainland China. Tone: documentary/statement — NOT over-enthusiastic or dramatic.

concept.logline: A quiet statement of a historic day — classic Porsches on the streets of Shanghai for the first time.
concept.tone: documentary, understated, statement-of-the-day — NOT dramatic, NOT over-enthusiastic

beats.label: Gathering
beats.description: Cars and owners arriving, assembling. The calm before. People getting ready, cars being prepared. Sets the human/personal tone before the drive.
no_go: blue 997 Speedster with RWB elements — no close-ups of this car

beats.label: Getting Ready
beats.description: Preparation moments — drivers getting in, engines starting, last checks. The anticipation before hitting the road.
must_include: driver or person interacting with car
no_go: blue 997 Speedster with RWB elements — no close-ups

beats.label: On The Road — The Milestone
beats.description: The historic moment. Cars driving on Shanghai public roads. This is the heart of the film. Multiple angles — wide convoy shots, road-level, Shanghai landmarks visible. Documentary, not dramatic.
must_include: cars in motion on public Shanghai road
Shanghai context clearly visible — signs, architecture, skyline
convoy or multiple cars together if available
no_go: overly dramatic angles — keep it observational

beats.label: Finishing at Porsche Center
beats.description: Cars arriving at or finishing at the Porsche Center. The conclusion of the drive. Could include people reacting, cars parked at the centre.

deliverables.label: Main edit
deliverables.notes: First draft by 12 June. Final by 18 June.

assets.music_brief: Understated, calm, documentary feel. NOT cinematic drama or EDM. Something that feels like a quiet historic moment — sparse piano or light orchestral. Should feel like a statement, not a celebration.
assets.audio_notes: FX3 sync audio available on all clips — engine sounds, Shanghai ambience, crowd. Use diegetic audio mixed under music for documentary feel. Open with ambient sound before music comes in if possible.
existing_assets: Photos to be sent by Michael — request confirmed

vision_no_go: blue 997 Speedster with RWB (wide-body kit) elements — flag any close-up of this car for removal
shots without Shanghai context for road beats
client_notes: Michael: documentary/statement tone, not over-enthusiastic. Footage covers: gathering, getting ready, driving, finishing at Porsche Center. Blue 997 Speedster with RWB mods is in the footage — do NOT close-up on it. Photos to follow from client.
